# Burlington 2009 mayor — Ranked Robin: Montroll, a perfect 5-0 Condorcet winner

*Generated from [`burlington_2009_ranked_robin.yaml`](../burlington_2009_ranked_robin.yaml) — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: `python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/tools_adam/scripts/build_yaml_pages.py`.*

**Method:** [Ranked Robin (RCV-RR / Copeland)](../../../00_start_here/RCV_Ranked_Robin) · **1 seat** · **Expected winner:** Montroll

## Scenario

The same real ballots counted round-robin: Montroll beats Kiss 4063-3476,
Wright 4596-3663, Smith 4569-2996, Simpson 6261-591, and Write-In 6656-100
— five wins, zero losses. The candidate a majority preferred to every
single rival is the one RCV-IRV eliminated in the semifinal. Lesson page:
README.md in this folder. Real ballots: PrefLib dataset 00005
(00005-00000002.toi, 8,980 ballots, 384 unique orders; from Burlington's
published election records). 6 ballots (0.07%) carrying equal-rank
overvotes are not representable in this ranked syntax and are excluded —
8,974 tabulated; every official figure reproduces within +/-1 and every
margin is hundreds of votes.

## Ballots

```text
Head-to-head / pairwise comparison — the Ranked Robin tally
Legend: For - Equal Support - Against   (row vs column)
             |       Wright       |       Kiss        |     Montroll      |      Smith        |     Simpson       |     WriteIn       |
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    Wright > |        ---         |4059 -  602 - 4313 |3663 -  715 - 4596 |3970 - 1212 - 3792 |5269 - 2396 - 1309 |6061 - 2751 -  162 |
      Kiss > | 4313 -  602 - 4059 |       ---         |3476 - 1435 - 4063 |3944 - 1456 - 3574 |5514 - 2617 -  843 |6147 - 2714 -  113 |
  Montroll > | 4596 -  715 - 3663 |4063 - 1435 - 3476 |       ---         |4569 - 1409 - 2996 |6261 - 2122 -  591 |6656 - 2218 -  100 |
     Smith > | 3792 - 1212 - 3970 |3574 - 1456 - 3944 |2996 - 1409 - 4569 |       ---         |5568 - 2685 -  721 |6055 - 2806 -  113 |
   Simpson > | 1309 - 2396 - 5269 | 843 - 2617 - 5514 | 591 - 2122 - 6261 | 721 - 2685 - 5568 |       ---         |3337 - 5476 -  161 |

Win–loss record — Copeland score = wins + ½·ties (most wins wins; ties broken by total margin, then lot order):
    #  Candidate  W–L–T  Copeland  Margin  Beats
    1  Montroll   5–0–0         5  +15319  Kiss, Wright, Smith, Simpson, WriteIn
    2  Kiss       4–1–0         4  +10742  Wright, Smith, Simpson, WriteIn
    3  Wright     3–2–0         3   +8850  Smith, Simpson, WriteIn
    4  Smith      2–3–0         2   +8668  Simpson, WriteIn
    5  Simpson    1–4–0         1  -15972  WriteIn
    6  WriteIn    0–5–0         0  -27607  —

Winner — Ranked Robin (RCV-RR): Montroll
   beats every opponent head-to-head — the Condorcet winner.
```

Run it yourself:

```bash
python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/starvote_larry_hastings.py method_comparisons/burlington_2009/burlington_2009_ranked_robin.yaml
```
